---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea to improve Best Of Rust
title: "[Feature] - Your Summary Plz"
labels: enhancement
---

<div align="center">
  <h1>Feature Request</h1>
  <p>Share your idea to make Best Of Rust better for everyone.</p>
  <sub>欢迎提出你的功能建议，帮助 Best Of Rust 持续改进。</sub>
</div>

<br>

## 1. What problem are you trying to solve?
<sub>你希望解决什么问题？</sub>

<!-- Describe the current pain point or limitation clearly and concisely. -->
<!-- 请简洁清晰地描述当前的痛点或限制。 -->

## 2. What solution would you like?
<sub>你期望的解决方案是什么？</sub>

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like to see. -->
<!-- 请描述你希望新增的功能。 -->

## 3. Why is this valuable?
<sub>这个功能的价值是什么？</sub>

<!-- Explain expected benefits, impact, and who would benefit. -->
<!-- 请说明预期收益、影响范围，以及谁会从中受益。 -->

## 4. Implementation suggestions (optional)
<sub>实现建议（可选）</sub>

<!-- Share design ideas, API sketches, prior art, or related links if you have them. -->
<!-- 如果你有设计思路、API 草案、同类参考或相关链接，请写在这里。 -->

## 5. Alternatives considered (optional)
<sub>考虑过的替代方案（可选）</sub>

<!-- Describe alternatives you've considered and why they are less suitable. -->
<!-- 请说明你考虑过的替代方案，以及为什么不够理想。 -->

## 6. Additional context (optional)
<sub>补充信息（可选）</sub>

<!-- Add screenshots, mockups, examples, or context that helps us understand your request. -->
<!-- 可补充截图、原型、示例或其他上下文信息，帮助我们理解你的需求。 -->

<br>

<div align="center">
  <h3>Thank you for helping improve Best Of Rust.</h3>
  <sub>感谢你为 Best Of Rust 的改进提出建议。</sub>
</div>
